summary.archival_abstract: Official lore titled “Game Overview | Star Atlas.” This record preserves what Star Atlas / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Game Overview | Star Atlas
0001.
The Game
Star Atlas offers multiple ways to experience the Galia Expanse. Explore on foot in third-person, command vast fleets from a strategic view, or dive into the economy. Choose your path and shape the galaxy's future.
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Third-Person Experience
Immerse yourself in AAA-quality exploration. Walk the decks of your ships, engage in FPS combat, and experience Galia up close.
Ship interior exploration
FPS and ship-to-ship combat
Resource extraction missions
Quest-driven storylines
Fleet Command RTS
Switch to a top-down strategic view to manage your entire armada. Coordinate fleet movements, control territories, and outmaneuver rival factions.
Mass fleet management
Territory control
Faction warfare
Real-time strategy
Browser-Based Play
Access Star Atlas from any device. SAGE Labs and Holosim bring the economy and fleet simulation to your browser. No downloads required.
Play anywhere
No special hardware needed
Full economic participation
Free-to-play options
Ready to Begin?
Choose your entry point into the Star Atlas universe. Start with the free Holosim simulation or dive into the full experience.
Play Now
Explore More Features
Galia ExpanseGame ModesYour Fleet, Your WayLife in GaliaFleet CommandHolosim
